channel.title: Copley Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Copley Family History

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Older Luke Margaret Round 2 Search
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Older Luke Margaret Round 2 Search This note preserves the follow-up Claude for Chrome search for the older Luke Murry and Margaret Murry named as Patrick Murry’s parents in Patrick’s 1871 Lewis County death register.

item.title: Tom Copley May 2026 Research Corrections
item.description: Tom Copley May 2026 Research Corrections This note preserves two May 2026 corrections from Tom Copley that change the handling of earlier AI-assisted research leads.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Murry Original Image Transcription
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Murry Original Image Transcription This note preserves Zach Copley’s Claude for Chrome original-image transcription pass for the key Lewis County Murry / Murray vital records.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Older Luke Margaret Murry Search
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Older Luke Margaret Murry Search This note preserves Zach Copley’s Claude for Chrome search for the older Luke Murry and Margaret Murry named as Patrick Murry’s parents in the 1871 Lewis County death register.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Census Image Capture
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Census Image Capture This note preserves Zach Copley’s May 14, 2026 Claude for Chrome image-capture pass for the key 1860 and 1870 Lewis County census pages in the Murray Settlement workflow.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Murry Continuity Search
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Murry Continuity Search This note preserves Zach Copley’s May 14, 2026 Claude for Chrome continuity search for Luke Murry / Murray and the separate adult Patrick Murry / Murray after their appearance in the 1860 Lewis County, Virginia census.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Murry Vital Records
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Murry Vital Records This note preserves Zach Copley’s May 14, 2026 Claude for Chrome verification report for three Lewis County Murry / Murray vital-record targets: Luke Murray and Anne Loghan marriage, 1854.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Byrne Carey Household
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Byrne Carey Household This note preserves Zach Copley’s May 13, 2026 Claude for Chrome follow-up on the John Byrne and Carey / Casey continuation entries in the 1870 Lewis County, West Virginia census.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Census District Geography
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Census District Geography This note preserves Zach Copley’s May 11, 2026 Claude for Chrome district-mapping output for the Lewis County FAN-sweep workstream.

item.title: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Mary Casey Household
item.description: Claude for Chrome Lewis County Mary Casey Household This note preserves Zach Copley’s May 11, 2026 Claude for Chrome household check for Mary Casey in the 1870 Lewis County, West Virginia census.
